title: Social Security Benefits Calculator
description: Interactive visualization showing how Social Security claiming age affects lifetime benefits, with breakeven analysis for different starting ages.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Social Security
Retirement Planning
Benefits
Personal Finance
audience: High School Students, Adults Planning Retirement
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of social security benefits calculator
Explore social security benefits calculator through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of social security benefits calculator to solve problems
